policy.sourceOfTruth: Infisical for runtime/API secrets; 1Password for human logins, recovery data, and client-shared passwords.
policy.agentAuthority: Scoped read/run by default. Production revocation or client-impacting rotation requires an approval packet unless explicitly authorized.

baselineMetadata.status: pending-provider-confirmation means the credential is tracked but the last rotation date has not been verified from the source of truth yet.
baselineMetadata.requiredEvidence: Provider dashboard/API event, Infisical audit/version metadata, 1Password item history, or an approved rotation packet.

secrets.rollback: Restore previous Infisical version, re-sync Vercel/n8n/local env, rerun Credential Smoke.
